confidence_note: N=50 sessions — thresholds suitable for production validation.
hardware_note: All thresholds derived from real DualShock Edge hardware data. Replace bridge magic numbers with these values after validating false-positive rate at each skill tier.

l4_mahalanobis_anomaly.derivation: mean + 3σ of per-session Mahalanobis distance from population centroid (6-proxy biometric feature space; ~99.7th percentile assuming Gaussian). Feature space: onset_l2, onset_r2, tremor_var, grip_asym, autocorr_lag1, autocorr_lag5.

l4_mahalanobis_continuity.derivation: mean + 2σ of per-session Mahalanobis distance from population centroid (6-proxy biometric feature space; ~95th percentile assuming Gaussian).

l5_cv_threshold.derivation: 10th percentile of per-session inter-press interval CVs (rising-edge R2 detection, same logic as validate_detection.py). Sessions used: 44 / 50 (excluded 6 with <20 presses).

l5_entropy_threshold.derivation: 10th percentile of per-session inter-press interval entropy (10-bin histogram). Sessions used: 44 / 50.

stick_noise_floor_lsb.derivation: mean of per-axis std across all sessions

imu_gyro_noise_floor_lsb.derivation: 95th percentile of per-axis gyro std across sessions
